seoTitle: Wilga West vs Wilgoyne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilga West and Wilgoyne. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wilga West vs Wilgoyne: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilga West and Wilgoyne.
heading: Wilga West vs Wilgoyne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilga West, Western Australia and Wilgoyne, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilgoyne has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wilga West (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilga West or Wilgoyne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilga West has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Wilgoyne scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilga West scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Wilgoyne scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilga West or Wilgoyne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilgoyne has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
